result.stdout:
Description:
  XrmMockup Metadata Generator - Generate metadata from Dataverse for XrmMockup testing

Usage:
  XrmMockup.MetadataGenerator.Tool [options]

Options:
  -o, --output <output>                  Output directory for generated metadata files
  -s, --solutions <solutions>            Comma-separated list of solution unique names
  -e, --entities <entities>              Comma-separated list of additional entity logical names to include
  -c, --config <config>                  Path to appsettings.json configuration file
  -p, --pretty-print                     Format XML output for readability (increases file size)
  -r, --security-roles <security-roles>  Comma-separated list of additional security role names to include
  -a, --all-security-roles               Include all security roles regardless of solution or named role filtering
  -?, -h, --help                         Show help and usage information
  --version                              Show version information
